_comment: Fallback when /api/google-reviews is unavailable. Match index.html illustrative tone; set GOOGLE_* env on Vercel for live Google reviews.

reviews.quote: Illustrative example: we document storm and wind damage and policy terms to support a fair scope when carriers undervalue the loss.
Illustrative example: we identify missed water and mold-related damage that initial carrier estimates often overlook.
Illustrative example: we help policyholders respond to underpayment and dispute resolution with organized evidence and clear communication.
